CVE-2020-18897.title: An use-after-free vulnerability in the libpff_item_tree_create_no ...
CVE-2020-18897.summary: An use-after-free vulnerability in the libpff_item_tree_create_node function of libyal Libpff before 20180623 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (DOS) or execute arbitrary code via a crafted pff file.
